name: Clinic.js (Node.js Performance Profiling Suite)

performance.notes: Profiling overhead varies by tool: doctor ~10%, flame ~5%

agent_readiness.notes: Node.js performance profiling suite. clinic doctor -- node server.js (health checks: event loop delay, CPU, memory, I/O). clinic flame -- node server.js (CPU flamegraph). clinic bubbleprof -- node server.js (async operations visualization). clinic heap -- node server.js (heap snapshot analysis). Generates interactive HTML reports. Load with autocannon: clinic doctor --autocannon [ . ] -- node server.js. NearForm's Node.js performance toolkit. Best for Express/Fastify API profiling.

gotchas: Tools must be installed separately (clinic, @clinic/doctor, etc.)
HTML report generation requires running under load
Event loop profiling adds overhead (not for production sampling)
bubbleprof visualization can be hard to interpret
best_when: Event loop delay detection and blocking I/O identification
CPU flamegraph generation for Node.js services
Heap memory analysis for Node.js memory leaks
avoid_when: When V8 built-in profiler (--prof flag) suffices
summary: Clinic.js is the Node.js performance profiling suite from NearForm. clinic doctor detects event loop delay, CPU, memory issues. clinic flame generates CPU flamegraphs. clinic bubbleprof visualizes async operations. clinic heap for memory analysis. Interactive HTML reports. Pairs with autocannon for load generation. Best tool for diagnosing Express/Fastify API performance problems.
